texto: In 30 years Christians will have baptized their picture of Christ. He won't be a nice, banal, meek, and bearded man with softly permed hair. Instead, he will fill our imaginations more solidly, more invasively , more unexpectedly. Christ will become That Man who changes people, someone who jumps off a bumper sticker and mediocre praise songs and into lives.
explicacao: Citação de Jonalyn Fincher sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In 30 years Christians will have baptized their picture of Christ. He won't be a nice, banal, mee…” articula vida, boldness, christ em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e christ.
